title: US Navy seizes Iranian cargo ship 'Touska' in Gulf of Oman after hours-long standoff
snippet: USS Spruance intercepted and seized the sanctioned Iranian cargo vessel Touska in the Gulf of Oman after a 6-hour standoff. Navy fired on engine room after repeated warnings. CENTCOM confirms ship was under US Treasury sanctions for prior illegal activity. Trump announced seizure on Truth Social.
tag_reason: First report of US Navy physically seizing an Iranian cargo ship — a major escalation from blockade and interdiction operations
